events.title: Check-In
events.details: Location TBA — you'll find out when you get there. Get settled, claim your bed, take in the lake.

events.title: Quick Supply Run
events.details: Grab drinks, food for dinner tonight, and any essentials for the weekend.

events.title: Dinner at the House
events.details: Cook together. First night, get settled in. Casual.

events.title: Cigars on the Deck
events.details: Light them up. Lake views. This is what it's about.

events.title: Cards / Poker / Hang
events.details: Poker, Magic draft, whatever gets going — spill out to the fire when it's time. Drinks, stories, and the appropriate roasting of the groom.

events.title: Breakfast at the House
events.details: Cook together. Eggs, coffee, the works.

events.title: TBD — Play Pickleball If Up For It
events.details: Tahoe Paradise Park has free outdoor pickleball courts (~10 min drive). Or just hang at the house — no pressure.

events.title: Lunch
events.details: Back at the house. Fuel up.

events.title: Halo 3 LAN Party
events.details: Multi-TV setup, everyone in. The main event. Bracket or free-for-all — sort it out on the day.

events.title: Get Ready
events.details: Clean up and look sharp. Dinner at Edgewood tonight.

events.title: Depart for Edgewood
events.details: Allow extra time — valet parking only. Entire party must be present to be seated.

events.title: Pre-Dinner Drinks — The Edge Lounge
events.details: Gather at the lounge before dinner. Lakefront fire pit, handcrafted cocktails, views across the water.

events.title: Dinner at The Bistro — Edgewood Tahoe
events.details: Tahoe-inspired cuisine, lakefront views, mountain-chic atmosphere. Cashless — credit card only. 180 Lake Pkwy, Stateline, NV.

events.title: Back to Base
events.details: Return to the house.

events.title: Cigars / Hang on the Deck
events.details: Last night — make it a good one.

events.title: Games / Poker / Video Games
events.details: Open floor — Magic, poker, Smash, whatever. Jump in and out.

events.title: Send-Off
events.details: Last night together. Make it count.

events.title: Breakfast & Clean Up
events.details: Final breakfast together. Clean the house. Check-out is firm at 10:00 AM.

events.title: Check-Out
events.details: Keys returned by 10:00 AM sharp. Load the cars.

events.title: Drive to Roseville
events.details: ~1.5–2 hrs via Hwy 50 west. Topgolf is right on the way home.

events.title: Topgolf — Roseville (Optional)
events.details: 1700 Freedom Way, Roseville, CA. Only if everyone's feeling up to it. Book 2 side-by-side bays in advance. $37/hr per bay noon–5pm, up to 6 players per bay. Clubs provided.

events.title: Head Home
events.details: Final send-off. See you at the wedding.
